calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-10-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Ryan Jackman for Leopoldo Oviedo, Jr., Petitioner (via Zoom).

Mr. Jackman confirmed that the estate contains no assets requiring administration. The only issue was an outstanding loan tied to a property, which passed to the surviving joint tenant (spouse). The lender refused to provide payoff details, necessitating temporary letters of administration to resolve the matter. The loan was paid off, the property was sold, and proceeds went to the surviving spouse.

The court ordered that the Petition for Letters of Administration is taken off calendar. The special administration order expires as of today.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
